category: 3. EP6 START & End of shift checklist
title: FORM:-  START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST

items.question: Clean inside and outside the clinching machine, Tool & Working area, oil spillage.
OE Deploy as per skill matrix
Wear personal protective  equipment(PPE)
Switch on power supply
Check the line air pressure
Main hydraulic pressure
Top tank pressure (Inlet Tank)
Top tank pressure (Outlet Tank)
L/R Clinch pressure
End  Clinch Pressure
Check the PM status of running model tool/fixture (Should be within due date mentioned)
Availability of rejection bin/rework trolley/ identification tag( Red,Yellow, Green)
Calibration of Instruments
Check PM status of Workstation/Machine (Cycle : Monthly)

sections.title: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question: Part missing Put the job inside the machine without tank assembly and try to start machine, Machine will not start. Now put complete assembly with tank inside the machine and try to start the machine, Machine should start.
Sealing Frame No Fold In Header
items.specified_value:
Not ok  Condition-Put the job inside the machine without checking of the sealing resting by levelling stick  press start button machine will not start 
ok  Condition-Put the job inside the machine After checking of the sealing resting by levelling stick  press start button machine start | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Safety Light Curtain Press Cycle start button of machine, When ram is moving down cut the Light Curtain by Dummy, Machine has to stop in between.If machine gets stop means POKAYOKE is working, if not inform to maintenance.
Clean inside and outside the clinching machine, Tool & Working area, oil spillage.
Removal and Record of rejection
Switch off power supply

sections.title: END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS : - - Poka Yoke Validation
